name: siem
description: OctoBus package for Wazuh SIEM alert query, vulnerability detection, and agent monitoring APIs.

Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/ListAlerts.name: list-alerts
Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/ListAlerts.description: Query Wazuh security alerts with filtering by query syntax, time range, severity level, and pagination.

Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/GetAlertSummary.name: get-alert-summary
Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/GetAlertSummary.description: Get Wazuh alert overview statistics grouped by severity level.

Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/ListVulnerabilitie.name: list-vulnerabilities
Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/ListVulnerabilitie.description: Query vulnerability detection results for a specific Wazuh agent.

Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/GetVulnerabilitySu.name: get-vulnerability-summary
Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/GetVulnerabilitySu.description: Get vulnerability detection summary for a specific Wazuh agent.

Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/ListAgents.name: list-agents
Wazuh_SIEM.Wazuh_SIEM/ListAgents.description: List Wazuh agents with status and OS information.
